The S-400 introduces three new missiles, the 9M96, 9M96/2 and the 40N6, which can be fitted in new canisters replacing all or some of the S-300 missile canisters on the TEL. It is believed that a new TEL vehicle has been developed specifically to carry the S-400 missiles, and that this is a wheeled vehicle carrying six to eight missiles. The 9M96 missile has a length of 4.75 m, a body diameter of 0.24 m, a launch weight of 333 kg, and a 24 kg HE warhead. Guidance is inertial with command updates and an active radar terminal seeker. The missile has a two-stage solid propellant motor system, with a maximum range of 40 km. The second stage has lateral thrust motors to improve manoeuvrability in the terminal phase, similar to the US PAC-3 design. It can intercept targets from 5 m up to 20 km altitude. texts.full_text: ation of tissue fragments. PTX was successful in all but one patient with an ectopic fifth gland; median follow-up time was 8.3 (range 2.8-19) years. Parathyroid hormone (PTH) dropped within 1 year after PTX from 1030 +/- 108 to 98 +/- 18 pg/ml, Ca*P from 59.5 +/- 3 to 49 +/- 2 mg(2)/dl(2). Oral calcium supply transiently increased from 18.7 +/- 4.2 to 24.1 +/- 4.8 mg/kg/day within the first 6 months (all P < 0.05). Haemoglobin increased from 10.7 +/- 0.4 to 11.5 +/- 0.3 g/dl (P < 0.01), despite similar erythropoietin dose and ferritin levels. In patients on long-term dialysis, Ca*P increased again after 18 months; three patients required a second PTX after 3.8, 12 and 12.3 years. Twelve patients underwent NTX 1.8 (0.3-3.8) years after PTX, which decreased mean PTH and Ca*P into the target range throughout the entire post-NTX observation period. Postoperative complications included one transient recurrent nerve palsy, one hypocalcaemic seizure and a case of haemopericardium. At present, no patient has clinical signs of bone disease. texts.full_text: Officer John Havens. This came on the heels of yesterday’s strong earnings report[4]. Michael Corbat, Citi’s CEO of Europe, Middle East and Africa, will take the top spot. He has been with the company for close to three decades. So, why did Pandit make his move? The reason he gave was that it’s the “right time.” But of course, Wall Street is full of speculation. Was Pandit disappointed with shareholders’ veto of his compensation package? Does he want to start a new chapter in life? Or does this move have something else behind it? The fact that the resignation came on such short notice and after yesterday's earnings report suggests there may be more going on than meets the eye. It’s possible Pandit was under pressure from various stakeholders, including shareholders who were not pleased with his compensation package or other internal issues within Citigroup. Pandit has been a controversial figure since he took over as CEO in 2009 following predecessor Richard Parsons' departure amidst scandals and regulatory woes. His tenure at the helm of one of Wall Street's largest banks was marked by several high-profile controversies, including his compensation package which drew sharp criticism from some shareholders. The decision to appoint Michael Corbat—a seasoned banker with extensive experience in Europe where Citigroup has a significant presence--as Pandit’s successor could be seen as an attempt for the company's leadership team and strategy not just reflect its global operations but also address internal concerns that have been simmering beneath surface. texts.full_text: 15. Chelsea Tyler DEscription to be added soon. Jon Foster Jon Foster (born August 3, 1984) is an American actor and musician. His films include the drama The Door in the Floor (2004), the horror film Stay Alive (2006), the thriller Brotherhood (2010), and the drama Rampart (2011). Foster is che lead actor of the television series 90210, playing the role of Liam Court. In addition to acting, Foster has also released several albums under his music label, "Bird in a Wire," showcasing his musical talents. Jon Foster married Chelsea Tyler on June 20, 2015, at a private ceremony held at The Foundry in Los Angeles, California. Chelsea Tyler is an American singer and songwriter known for her work with the band The 80s Housewife. She has released several albums since 2009, including "My Name Is Chelsea" (2012) and "The Breakdown" (2016). texts.full_text: s dismissed from court earlier this month after the judge said there is no evidence to support consumers' claims. The class action lawsuit against iPhone manufacturer came under criticism following an expose published in July 2011, which detailed how third-party applications such as Skyhook and a division of Twitter had been accessing personal user data on users' phones. According to court documents seen by TechNewsWorld last night (27 October), US District Judge John A Gerrard ruled against the consumers because there was no evidence produced during trial that proved their claims. He added: "Plaintiffs have offered virtually nothing as proof." Gerrard explained that four individual suits brought together in 2010 could not show any form of harm to themselves due, he said at a hearing on Wednesday (27 October), but still the judge was sympathetic towards consumer's cause. "Some might look at this and say I threw the consumers out with no help for them," Gerrard admitted. "I did find myself sorry that [the case] got away." But there are already similar lawsuits against Apple currently in action which will decide how much control iPhone manufacturers have to track user data when used on third-party apps. The latest of those is due before a court later this year and it follows from earlier, high-profile complaints about personal privacy concerns made by former US President Bill Clinton last April (26). In June 2011, he filed a suit claiming that the location tracking feature was turned off automatically every time his iPhone switched between "normal" mode to flight-mode. Clinton's claims have already been thrown out and rejected in September. The current case against Apple from consumers who want compensation is based on similar grounds of data privacy infringement through third-party app misuse, as a result iOS software did not behave properly by using too much phone storage capacity or power usage which increased costs for users when the devices went to repair shops. texts.full_text: n the algal model. The algal model was successfully calibrated and validated against mesoscop data from an outdoor experiment with Skeletonema costatum growth under different light conditions. However, to ensure that our findings are applicable beyond diatoms or even phytoplankton, it is important to validate the 3-D algal model in a variety of aquatic environments and for other types of algae. The validation process would involve comparing the predicted results from the Eulerian water quality model against experimental data obtained under various conditions. These could include different light intensities, nutrient concentrations (such as nitrogen or phosphorus), temperatures, salinity levels, and even predation pressure to assess how well our algal growth predictions align with actual observations. The validated 3-D model can then be used for more accurate management of algae blooms by providing insight into the dynamics of different types of algae in turbulent waters. This information is crucial as it allows water resource managers and environmentalists to better understand potential bloom scenarios, their implications on local ecosystems (such as oxygen depletion), and devise effective mitigation strategies. Moreover, understanding how diatoms like Skeletonema costatum respond to changes in light availability due to mixing processes can provide valuable insights into the overall structure of plankton communities. Diatom dynamics are often a key indicator species for assessing water quality since they're sensitive to nutrient enrichment and other environmental factors that could lead to eutrophication. In conclusion, developing accurate models such as HYDRO-3D is essential in our efforts towards effective algal bloom management. It provides us with the necessary tools to predict how different types of algae might respond under varying conditions, allowing for more informed decision-making and potentially reducing harmful environmental impacts associated with excessive algal growth. Future work should continue refining this model by incorporating feedback from field studies across diverse aquatic environments while also expanding our understanding of other factors influencing plankton ecology.

texts.full_text: he basis where the charged-lepton Yukawa matrix and heavy Majorana neutrino mass matrix are diagonal. We search for all possible Dirac mass textures which contain at least one zero entry in $3 \times 2$ matrix and evaluate the corresponding lepton asymmetries. We present the baryon asymmetry in terms of a single low energy unknown, a Majorana CP phase to be clued from neutrinoless double beta decay. author: - Sanghyeon Chang - Sin Kyu Kang - Kim Siyeon title: 'Minimal seesaw model with tri/bi-maximal mixing and leptogenesis' --- Introduction ============ Thanks to the accumulating data from experiments on the atmospheric and solar neutrinos experiments [@atm; @SK2002; @SNO], we are now convinced that neutrinos oscillate among three active neutrinos. Interpreting each experiment in terms of two-flavor mixing, the mixing angle for the oscillation of atmospheric neutrinos is understood to be maximal ($\theta_{atm} \approx 45^\circ$), while solar experiments favor a large but not maximal mixinig angle ($31^{\degree}\lesssim\theta_{\odot}\leq 39.2$). The third mixing angule $\teta$ has been found to be small, with an upper bound of approximately $8 \degrees$. In this paper we consider the minimal seesaw mechanism in which only two heavy right-handed Majorana neutrinos are introduced [@minimal_seesawa; @minimalseesawe]. This is sufficient for describing all current oscillation data and has interesting implications on leptogenesis. The goal of our work was to find out if the tri/bi maximal mixing can be realized in this minimal seesaw framework with a specific texture (at least one zero entry) imposed upon it's Dirac mass matrix, while also exploring possible connections between low energy CP violation and baryon asymmetry via leptogenesis.

Prior studies suggest that higher early post-MI mortality rates may be limited to younger women, who represent a distinct group characterized by unique risk factors and pathophySiology \[[@CR3]\]. The presence of diabetes greatly increases the risk of coronary heart disease (CHD) in both men and women, and diabetic women appear to be at a higher risk of death compared with diabetic men \[[@CR4]-[@CR8]\]. Nevertheless, the extent to which diabetes, female sex and age, interact and impact clinical outcomes over time following AMI remains unclear. With the marked geo-economic transition in recent decades, the burden of cardiovascular disease has shifted to Asia where it is expected to reach epidemic proportions due to rapidly increasing rates of smoking, obesity and diabetes \[[@CR9],[@CR10]\]. Yet, epidemiologic data are scarce amongAsian patients and even fewer have specifically assessed diabetes and other important clinical and sociodemographic correlates to 5-year survival following AMI in this part of the world \[[@CR11],[@CR12],[@CR13]\]. We hypothesized that diabetes in both Asian women and men might have higher mortality impact compared with US or Western patients. texts.full_text: at buffets(with exception of the Wynn and Bellagio), especially in Vegas because that's a reminder about how awful Western civilization has evolved into. The longest line was for the seafood section, particularly the Alaskan king crab. We sat nearby that station and could see random people wobbling away with crab legs piled high on their plate."It's like they are walking away with the world's deadliest catch on their plates," said Nicky.She and PokerProf poked fun at the unwashed masses waiting in line for the seafood and would laugh uncontrollably when someone wearing a gaudy or garish outfit had an excessive amount of crab legs dangling off their plate, like the guy decked out in Joey Buttafucco pants and a t-shirt that said, "I fish naked." Another guy scooped out liquid butter into a drinking glass. He has at least 8 oz. of pure butter in a glass that sloshed its way around as he stumbled away from the seafood station.I needed a nap after the food coma that the buffet induced. I woke up when Maudie arrived before Midnight. We hopped in a cab for the Imperial Palace. Our cabbie made fun of Jews on the way, but apparently it was kosher since he was Jewish. He even showed us his yamika when he had hidden underneath a baseball hat."Sammy Davis? Now he was a good jew. Danny Gans? Bad jew. texts.full_text: Sequence and topological characterization of Toll-like receptor 8 gene of Indian riverine buffalo (Bubalus bubalis). In this study, buffalo (Bubalus bubalis) Toll-like receptor 8 (TLR8) gene has been characterized by sequence analysis and detecting polymorphism. Complete ORF of buffalo TLR8 gene was amplified using the RNA isolated from spleen tissue, which was found to be 3,102 nucleotides long encoding a 1,033 amino acid protein. Buffalo TLR8 had 10 nucleotide changes as compared to other livestock species resulting in six unique amino acid changes, four of them lying within leucine-rich repeat (LRR) domains. As compared to cattle (Bos indicus and Bos taurus), out of fifteen cysteine residues, fourteen were conserved and Cys at position 521 was replaced by Arg. The `IllegalArgumentException` indicates that Tomcat cannot find the specified main web resources, which are typically located within the JAR itself. Here’s how to resolve this: ### 1. Ensure Your Application Structure is Correct - Make sure your application has a proper structure for an executable jar with embedded Tomcat. - The `src/main/resources` directory should contain any static files or templates, and these resources need to be accessible from the classpath. ### 2. Set Up Resource Base Properly in Your Application Code #### Example: Using Spring Boot (if applicable) If you are using Spring Boot with an embedded Tomcat server, it usually handles this for you automatically when running `java -jar myApp.jar`. However, if you're manually configuring the context or resource base: ```java import org.springframework.boot.SpringApplication; import org.springframework.boot.autoconfigure.SpringBootApplication; @SpringBootApplication public class MyAppApplication { public static void main(String[] args) { SpringApplication.run(MyAppApplication.class, args); } } ``` #### Example: Manually Configuring Embedded Tomcat If you are not using Spring Boot and configuring the embedded server manually: ```java import org.apache.catalina.Context; import org.apache.catalina.startup.Tomcat; public class App3 { public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception { String webappDirLocation = "src/main/webapp/"; // Adjust if necessary Tomcat tomcat = new Tomcat(); // Set the port int port = Integer.parseInt(System.getProperty("server.port", "8080")); tomcat.setPort(port); Context context = tomcat.addWebapp("/", webappDirLocation); String jarPath = System.getProperty("java.class.path"); if (jarPath != null) { File file = new File(jarPath); URL url = file.toURI().toURL(); WebResourceRoot resources = new StandardRoot(context); resources.addPreResources(new UrlResourceSet(url, "/")); context.set Resources(resources); } tomcat.start(); tomcat.getServer().await(); } } ``` ### 3. texts.full_text: of state [@LI; @HM; @FEH; @Myung2; @KLM]. Recently, there was an attempt to make a correspondence between the holographic dark energy and Chaplygin gas [@SetaC]. Also the connection between the holographic dark energy and tachyon model [@Sen1; @Sen2; @Gibb] was introduced to explain the dark energy [@SetaT; @ZZL]. In the cases of Chaplygin gas with $p=-A/\rho$ [@KMP; @FGS] and tachyon model with $V(T)=\sqrt{A}$ [@FKS], one has the EOS range of $-1\le \omega_{\rm C,T} \le 0$. Also we have a similar range $-1\le \omega_{\rm \Lambda} \le -1/3$ for the holographic dark energy with the future event horizon [@LI]. In spite of the similarity between the holographic dark energy model and chaplygin gas (tachyon model), there exist differences. We consider the linear perturbation of holographic dark energy towards a dark energy-dominated universe. For this purpose, a key quantity is the squared speed of sound $v^2=d p/d \rho$ [@PR]. The sign of $v^2$ is crucial for determining the stability of a background evolution. If this is negative, it means a classical instability of a given perturbation. It is known that the Chaplygin gas (tachyon) have the positive squared speeds of sound with $v_{\rm C,T}^2=-\omega_{\rm C,T}$ and thus they are supposed to be stable against small perturbations [@GKMPS; @STZW]. Description of the Prior Art Attrition through a humid (wet) method consists of submitting ore grains which are dispersed in water to friction and blows, the force of which is too weak to produce grinding, but nevertheless sufficiently high to free the softest portions. These portions arethen separated from the harder ones by screening or classification. This process allows for efficient liberation of valuable minerals from their host rocks without generating fine particles that could clog the processing equipment. 3. Summary of the Invention The present invention provides a novel method and apparatus for carrying out attrition in a humid medium, particularly for previously ground ores. The process involves using mechanical forces such as friction and blows to separate valuable minerals from their host rocks without generating excessive fine particles that could hinder further processing. 4. Detailed Description of the Invention The invention comprises several key components: - A container or reactor designed to hold water and ore grains, providing a controlled environment for attrition. - Mechanical means such as paddles or agitators within the container to create friction and blows on the ore particles. - Control systems to monitor and adjust variables like speed, pressure, and temperature during the process.
